head.title: Sitemap Match
head.desc: Match our sitemap vocabulary against terms on a web page — even when the wording differs but means the same.
log.title: 📜 Change log
log.empty.title: No entries yet
log.empty.sub: Adding/editing/removing terms · Excel · categories will be logged here with actor and time
settings.engine.hint: how page terms are compared to the sitemap
settings.useAi: Use AI to judge “unclear” terms (requires model + API configured)
settings.bypass: 🚫 Auto-skip popups while fetching (cookie consent · modal/overlay · paywall · newsletter)
settings.note: bypassPopup is sent to the backend at crawl time · other values are reserved for AI integration
train.template.title: Download a training template
train.export.title: Export this category's vocabulary as Excel
train.readonly: 🔗 This category auto-combines {sources} — add/edit terms in the source categories
map.title: 🗺️ Head term → variants (aliases)
map.hint: No Excel needed — add/remove/edit terms here, saved to the DB for matching right away
map.empty: No terms yet — click “＋ Add term” or upload Excel
scan.noscan.title: No scan yet
scan.noscan.sub: Pick a category, then enter a URL to match
report.title: ④ Report — match summary
modal.title: ＋ Add term
prompt.addTerm: Add head term — e.g. Share Price
prompt.addTermTh: Description / Thai — e.g. ราคาหลักทรัพย์
prompt.addAlias: Add a mapped term — e.g. balance sheet
prompt.deleteCat: Delete “{cat}”? Its terms will be removed too
